inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $174.4M minus normalized capital spending $130.0M [Assumption: $49M above mid-cycle maintenance for Taiwan datacenter capacity build], divided by 60.2M FY2025 diluted shares; filing OCF and capex from 10-K FY2025
inputs.cash_source: Cash and equivalents $439.7M at March 31, 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.normalization_note: Reported FY2025 owner cash was negative ($174.4M OCF minus $179.1M capex). Lawrence base uses normalized capex until Taiwan lease/build-out completes; Q1 2026 run-rate FCF would annualize to ~$1.43/sh on 76M shares but is not used as FCF0 to avoid one-quarter heroics.

segments.label: Data center optical transceivers (800G+ hyperscale)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated normalized FCF allocated 42.9% by segment revenue (10-K Note revenue by market)
segments.notes: Fastest-growing market per 10-K; Q1 2026 data center 53.9% of revenue; vertical laser integration

segments.label: Cable TV / Quantum Bandwidth equipment
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated normalized FCF allocated 53.8% by segment revenue
segments.notes: FY2025 CATV revenue +179% YoY to $245M; MSO direct sales since 2023; cyclical upgrade cycle

segments.label: Telecom and FTTH (legacy)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated normalized FCF allocated 3.3% by segment revenue
segments.notes: Telecom $13.7M + FTTH $1.2M FY2025; declining strategic emphasis

options.label: Amazon.com warrant / transaction agreement (March 2025)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Warrant recorded as contra-revenue $0.8M FY2025; strategic supply relationship embedded in data center growth, not separately terminal-valued without disclosed fair value
options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 Exhibit 10.1 Transaction Agreement and 4.01 Warrant with Amazon.com NV Investment Holdings LLC dated March 13, 2025

options.label: 800G AI datacenter transceiver ramp
options.base_terminal_rationale: AI-driven demand modeled in data center segment growth 25% years 1-5, not double-counted
options.evidence: 10-K Item 1: internet data center fastest-growing; 800 Gbps speeds cited in business description

corporate_drag.notes: Customer concentration risk, R&D 425 employees, equity dilution from 2025-2026 offerings; approximate corporate burden not allocated to segments

bear.notes: Hyperscaler share loss; Digicomm/Microsoft concentration triggers pricing reset; capex overruns persist; dilution continues

base.notes: Data center mix rises; CATV upgrade cycle normalizes; capex falls toward maintenance after Taiwan build

bull.notes: 800G share gains at multiple hyperscalers; Amazon warrant converts to volume; CATV MSO direct channel scales

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: PP&E and lease assets marked at cost; no land-at-zero pattern (10-K balance sheet)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating manufacturing assets in Texas, Taiwan, China; no royalty trust pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Consolidated operating income positive FY2025 $54.6M and Q1 2026 $13.0M

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Amazon transaction agreement March 2025; hyperscaler demand embedded in data center growth assumptions

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No special dividend or litigation recovery catalyst

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: 800G datacenter transceivers already in data center revenue path; Q1 2026 mix 53.9%

growth_explanation.mechanism: Hyperscale datacenter operators upgrade switch/server interconnects to 800G optical modules; AOI's vertically integrated laser chips (MBE/MOCVD) and Taiwan/China transceiver capacity win sockets versus merchant laser vendors; parallel CATV MSO bandwidth upgrades via Quantum Bandwidth direct sales
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 Item 1 Business; Q1 2026 segment revenue mix

falsifiers.trigger: Digicomm or Microsoft revenue share falls below 20% without replacement hyperscaler
Capital spending stays above $150M annually with FCF remaining negative after 2027

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

blockers: option component amazon_datacenter_option requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment
validation_errors: option component amazon_datacenter_option requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment

falsifiers: Normalized owner cash stays below $0.50 per share for two consecutive quarters while capex remains above $150M annually.
Amazon warrant expires or hyperscaler volume shifts away without replacement customer above 15% of revenue.
Cash falls below $250M with no offsetting reduction in growth capex or dilution.
Share count stabilizes below 70M diluted and top-two customer share falls below 60% of revenue for four quarters.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components replace operating_business_fallback: normalized owner-cash engine, Amazon/datacenter option, net surplus cash, and dilution/concentration reserve.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q: revenue $455.7M (+83% YoY), OCF $174.4M, capex $179.1M, normalized owner cash $0.74/sh, cash $439.7M, diluted shares 76.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to primary filings before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Normalized owner cash stays below $0.50 per share for two consecutive quarters while capex remains above $150M annually.

source.locator: Net cash provided by operating activities $174.4M FY2025
Purchases of property, plant and equipment $179.1M FY2025

inputs.label: Normalized maintenance plus Taiwan build capex

source.locator: FY2025 OCF $174.4M minus normalized capex $130M [Assumption: $49M above mid-cycle maintenance]

inputs.label: Normalized owner cash per diluted share

source.locator: Weighted average diluted shares 75.98M Q1 2026

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5 on normalized owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence scenario envelope from valuation.json scenarios.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7 on normalized owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Fade after datacenter mix shift and CATV cycle normalization.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 12× / 16× / 20× on year-7 cash path.

assumptions.label: Seven-year owner-cash engine per share
assumptions.rationale: Capitalized normalized owner cash at Lawrence scenario envelope; reconciled to legacy fallback schedule.

components.label: Amazon transaction agreement and 800G ramp option

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q: revenue $455.7M (+83% YoY), OCF $174.4M, capex $179.1M, normalized owner cash $0.74/sh, cash $439.7M, diluted shares 76.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to primary filings before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Amazon warrant expires or hyperscaler volume shifts away without replacement customer above 15% of revenue.

source.locator: Warrant-related contra-revenue $0.8M FY2025 (Amazon transaction agreement March 2025)
Data center revenue $195.7M (42.9% of FY2025 revenue)
Weighted average diluted shares 75.98M Q1 2026

assumptions.label: Probability-weighted 800G hyperscaler volume upside
assumptions.rationale: Amazon warrant and transaction embedded in data center growth; low case zero incremental.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted Amazon/datacenter option per share
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping with core DCF terminal; warrant fair value not separately disclosed.

components.label: Net surplus cash after operating minimum

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q: revenue $455.7M (+83% YoY), OCF $174.4M, capex $179.1M, normalized owner cash $0.74/sh, cash $439.7M, diluted shares 76.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to primary filings before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Cash falls below $250M with no offsetting reduction in growth capex or dilution.

source.locator: Cash and cash equivalents $439.7M at March 31, 2026
Weighted average diluted shares 75.98M Q1 2026

assumptions.label: Cash required for Taiwan build and working capital
assumptions.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable liquidity during capacity ramp.

assumptions.label: Net surplus cash per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: Cash $439.7M less operating minimum, divided by 76M shares; bounded to component schedule.

components.label: Customer concentration, dilution, and capex-trap reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q: revenue $455.7M (+83% YoY), OCF $174.4M, capex $179.1M, normalized owner cash $0.74/sh, cash $439.7M, diluted shares 76.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to primary filings before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Share count stabilizes below 70M diluted and top-two customer share falls below 60% of revenue for four quarters.

inputs.label: Top two customers share of FY2025 revenue

source.locator: Digicomm 53% and Microsoft 29% of FY2025 revenue (major customers note)
Weighted average diluted shares 60.2M FY2025
Weighted average diluted shares 75.98M Q1 2026 (+26% vs FY2025)
Weighted average diluted shares 75.98M Q1 2026

assumptions.label: Customer concentration, equity dilution, and capex-trap reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for Digicomm/Microsoft concentration, share count expansion, and persistent capex overruns.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Normalized consolidated owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?
